tickets.title: US001: Student
tickets.description:
As a Student i want to buy a cheap buy, so that i can save money.
Acceptence Critical:
1. Is student can view a selling products?
2. Is they know about products status, price?

tickets.title: US002: Student
tickets.description:
As a Student, I want to sell my old books, so that make some income.
Acceptence Critical:
1. Is Student can upload the products information?
2. CAn products be viewed by others students?

tickets.title: US003: Student
tickets.description:
As a student, i want to choose a meeting place, so that i can feel safe and easy to meet.
Acceptance Critical:
1. Is students able to choose meeting places?
2. IS meeting places is list clearly?

tickets.title: US004: Student Union President
tickets.description:
As Student Union President, i want to take 2% transaction  fee to fund club, so that university will have more club activities.
Acceptance Critical:
1. Is app record 2% transaction correctly?
2. Is all stakeholders knows?

tickets.title: US005: Student Union President
tickets.description:
As an Student Union President, i want to know & record about selling and buying activites, so that i can easily manager and prevent unwanted problems.
Acceptence Critical:
1. Are all transations recored?
2. Is recoreds able to view clearly?

tickets.title: NFR Epic 1: Security:
tickets.description: Security: Do not allow people from outside coming to buy cheap couches.

tickets.title: NFR Epic 2: Performance:
tickets.description: Performance: app must be able to servic all of student even they all access at the same time.

tickets.title: NFR Epic 3: Usability:
tickets.description: Usability: UI must clear, easy to use, student without knowledge about technology can use app simple.

analysis.ambiguity1: "Scan the barcode with my phone camera" is unclear. Image form scan is too universal, cannot absolutely correct and fix requirements for data structure, even do not count the vary design of textbook.
analysis.ambiguity2: "The app should force users to select a safe zone before they can chat." is ambiguity. Naturally, people chosen books and check if products are avaible. Choose locations first make lowers engagement and effective of app.
analysis.conflictSolution:
University Legal Team: want app do not process payments. Students have to pay via Venmo or cash.
Student Union President want to take 2% transaction fee to fund club.
=> If Students pay via cash, app have no way to track
=> Add 2% fee on price of products, and seller wil give after selling.
analysis.nfr1: Security: Do not allow people from outside coming to buy cheap couches.
analysis.nfr2: Performance: app must be able to servic all of student even they all access at the same time.
analysis.nfr3: Usability: UI must clear, easy to use, student without knowledge about technology can use app simple.
